nasb.text: They observed the Passover in the first month, on the fourteenth day of the month, at twilight, in the wilderness of Sinai; according to all that the Lord had commanded Moses, so the sons of Israel did.

esv.text: And they kept the Passover in the first month, on the fourteenth day of the month, at twilight, in the wilderness of Sinai; according to all that the Lord commanded Moses, so the people of Israel did.

cnv.text: 他們就在正月十四日，黃昏的時候，在西奈曠野守了逾越節；耶和華怎樣吩咐了摩西，以色列人就怎樣行了。

ccb.text: 一月十四日黄昏，以色列人照耶和华对摩西的吩咐，在西奈山守逾越节。
